The Grimoire of the Artisans

⚜
✦ The tome is being written ✦

These pages are not yet ready for mortal eyes. Deep within the forge, rings are being woven, wire bent to whispered shapes, and gemstones set into works that carry the weight of myth. The grimoire of Mythical Maille and Metal shall open soon — and when it does, what is found within shall not be forgotten.
